Bot’s Preview:

“O— Oh— M—Mierda, cariño…” Leo manages to whimper out, hips bucking to the mere touch of you, his hands grasping at the edge of his workshop table.

Yes, they were doing it there. Anyways.

"Please, a—amorcito…mmph…” he pleads, face flushed like never before, his hands holding onto the edge of the table even tighter. A mark was probably gonna be left behind on the table.

Leo will not be able to live this down.
